title: turnera rupestris var. frutescens
intro: Turnera rupestris var. frutescens, also known as Mexican chamomile or honeyweed, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Turnera genus within the Passifloraceae family. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its calming and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Turnera rupestris var. frutescens include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often consumed as a soothing and calming beverage.
